title: Robust Russian Semolina Wrap
description: A peppery and chewy Russian dish featuring semolina rimacinata, ssam wrap, and ayurvedic sattvic friendly ingredients, perfect for a weeknight dinner

ingredients.name: ssam wrap
ingredients.notes: large lettuce leaves or napa cabbage leaves

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine semolina rimacinata, black pepper, and salt, and mix well.
Gradually add 1/2 cup of warm water to the bowl and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into 4 equal pieces and roll each piece into a ball.
Roll out each ball into a thin circle, about 1/8 inch thick.
Brush both sides of each circle with ghee or vegan butter.
Heat a large non-stick skillet over medium heat and cook each circle for 1-2 minutes on each side, until lightly browned.
To assemble the wrap, place a cooked semolina circle on a flat surface, then add a piece of ssam wrap on top.
Garnish with chopped scallions, chopped fresh dill, and a squeeze of lemon juice.
